name: cs-end
description: CS Session Closing — Session Digest (Attention) → 4-Agent parallel analysis → Learning Gate (Input Gate) → CS_V7 Knowledge Write (Phase 2.1) → Selective version-up (GRU Update Gate) → Knowledge Decay (Forget Gate) → Structured compact handoff (Hidden State). v3: principle-tier learnings flow into CS_V7 personal wiki pipeline.
